query:
UPDATE projects
        SET 
            project_name = $1,
            sales_amount = $2,
            gross_profit_amount = $3,
            status = $4,
            root_type = $5,
            burden_ratio = $6,
            load_value = $7,
            assigned_date = $8,
            completed_date = $9,
            updated_at = NOW()
        WHERE id = $10
